nasb.text: Then the men of Judah came and there anointed David king over the house of Judah. And they told David, saying, “It was the men of Jabesh-gilead who buried Saul.”

esv.text: And the men of Judah came, and there they anointed David king over the house of Judah. When they told David, “It was the men of Jabesh-gilead who buried Saul,”

cnv.text: 於是猶大人來到希伯崙，在那裡膏立了大衛作王，統治猶大家。 有人報告大衛說：“埋葬掃羅的是基列．雅比人。”

ccb.text: 犹大人到希伯仑膏立大卫做犹大支派的王。 大卫听说是基列·雅比人埋葬了扫罗，
